details: The agent navigated to the correct URL, extracted real issue titles via JavaScript DOM queries, and reported 5 specific technical issue titles with issue numbers. The titles are plausible real GitHub issues (specific, technical). The open issue count of 820 is in the hundreds as expected. Issue #36175 showing only 'Bug:' as the title is a legitimate edge case where the actual issue title may be incomplete on GitHub. The agent successfully completed all required steps.
